pph: SELECT time,pph FROM pph WHERE board = '{0}'
pphavgdaily: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 86400)) AS hour_start, AVG(pph) AS avg_score FROM pph WHERE board = '{0}' GROUP BY hour_start
pphavgweekly: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(pph) AS avg_score FROM pph WHERE board = '{0}' GROUP BY hour_start
pphavgmonthly: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(time), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')) AS month_start, AVG(pph) AS avg_score FROM pph WHERE board = '{0}' GROUP BY month_start
pphjewdar: SELECT time,pph FROM pph WHERE board = 'soy'
pphjewdaravgdaily: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 86400)) AS hour_start, AVG(pph) AS avg_score FROM pph WHERE board = 'soy' GROUP BY hour_start
SELECT (time - MOD(time, 86400)) AS hour_start, AVG(count) AS avg_score FROM jewdar GROUP BY hour_start
pphjewdaravgweekly: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(pph) AS avg_score FROM pph WHERE board = 'soy' GROUP BY hour_start
SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(count) AS avg_score FROM jewdar GROUP BY hour_start
postersavgdaily: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 86400)) AS hour_start, AVG(posters) AS avg_score FROM statistics GROUP BY hour_start
news: --title "Scatter plot of pinned news upload times"
descriptions: SELECT time FROM descriptions WHERE board = '{0}'
rtlweeklyavg: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY hour_start
rtlweeklyavgvoters: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY hour_start
SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(voters) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY hour_start
rtlweeklyavgvotersonly: SELECT (time - MOD(time, 604800)) AS hour_start, AVG(voters) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY hour_start
rtlmonthlyavg: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(time), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')) AS month_start, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY month_start
rtlmonthlyavgvoters: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(time), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')) AS month_start, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY month_start
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(time), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')) AS month_start, AVG(voters) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY month_start
rtlmonthlyavgvotersonly: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(time), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')) AS month_start, AVG(voters) AS avg_score FROM rtl GROUP BY month_start
